data.title: Trump's criticism of Powell and the Fed impacts global economy; central banks' independence crucial for investors, economists.
data.description: Investors and economists highly value the independence of central banks, which ensures policymakers can make decisions without political interference.
Merz Says EU Must Manage With Available Funds

data.title: By 2025, hybrid cloud is preferred for AI deployments. On-premises deployments rising. 90% recognize AI's importance.
data.description: The "State of AI, 2025" report recently added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's resources reveals a notable surge in enterprise awareness and adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) globally. Businesses are swiftly integrating AI into their operations due to advancements in AI technologies and enhanced accessibility. Almost 90% of IT and business decision-makers acknowledge the importance of AI and machine learning in meeting their business goals. This emphasizes the growing significance of AI, with notable implications for various industries.

data.title: ansrsource launches GranuLearn LMS, designed for modern organizations to drive performance, featuring mobile-first technology.
data.description: ansrsource, a prominent player in learning transformation and corporate training optimization, has introduced GranuLearn®, a cutting-edge mobile-first Learning Management System (LMS). This innovative platform is tailored for contemporary, widely distributed organizations, catering to both nimble small enterprises and large-scale teams. GranuLearn simplifies the process of initiating, expanding, and evaluating learning initiatives that significantly enhance organizational productivity. It facilitates the incorporation of exclusive learning material and seamless integration with other systems.

data.title: ResearchAndMarkets reports on Oceania Colocation Data Center Portfolio with 174 existing data centers, 46 upcoming, and 62 operators/investors. 1GW new capacity by 2025. Rack capacity mainly in Australia, Auckland leads in New Zealand.
data.description: A new database titled "Oceania Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. By the end of 2025, approximately 1GW of fresh data center capacity is anticipated to be operational in the Oceania region. The upcoming data center power capacity in the Oceania market surpasses the current size by over two-fold, mainly centralized in Australia. Auckland in New Zealand holds the highest number of data centers in the country. This development signifies a significant expansion in the data center sector within Oceania.
US Authors Might Join Forces in Copyright Lawsuit Against Anthropic's Ban, Court Rules

data.title: "Exodus Adventure Travels initiates 'September to Remember' program with exclusive trips and experiences worldwide."
data.description: In a recent announcement made in New York on July 17, 2025, Exodus Adventure Travels, a renowned company specializing in small-group guided travel experiences, introduced its exclusive "September to Remember" program. This initiative showcases unique trips and exceptional opportunities during the Insider's Season for Global Exploration. With a focus on creating memorable journeys, the award-winning company is offering travelers a chance to engage in curated experiences and discover unparalleled adventures during this special time.
Merz Says Taxation of Companies Is Not a Legal Option for the European Union

data.title: Coro, a leading cybersecurity platform, appoints Joe Sykora as new CEO to accelerate growth and deepen commitment to channel ecosystem.
data.description: In Chicago, Coro, a prominent cybersecurity platform for small and midsize businesses, has named Joe Sykora as the new Chief Executive Officer. Sykora, a well-known figure in the cybersecurity channel realm, takes over from co-founder Guy Moskowitz, who has steered Coro for more than ten years. This change signals a significant step for Coro as it aims to expand globally and enhance its focus on the channel ecosystem. Moskowitz's dedication and strategic approach have shaped Coro's journey thus far.

data.title: RiskStream Collaborative's RAPID X chosen for PropertyCasualty360's 2025 Insurance Luminaries, a recognition of excellence.
data.description: RAPID X, an auto claims data exchange solution developed by RiskStream Collaborative, was recently recognized by PropertyCasualty360 as part of the prestigious Insurance Luminaries Class of 2025. The platform based in Malvern, Pennsylvania, offers innovative solutions for the insurance industry.

data.title: Hexagon and Management Controls Inc. release EcoSys™ + myTrack Integrated Solution to enhance project performance.
data.description: In Houston, a collaboration between Hexagon's Asset Lifecycle Intelligence division and Management Controls Inc. has led to the official launch of the EcoSys + myTrack integrated solution. This partnership combines expertise in enterprise project performance and contractor data management to provide real-time cost and progress insights for shutdowns, turnarounds, outages, and capital projects. The integrated solution aims to enhance visibility and efficiency in managing such projects, benefiting stakeholders with accurate and timely information.

data.title: Tri Counties Bank & FHLBank SF donate $180,000 for affordable homeownership in Chico, Calif through Empowering Homeownership Program.
data.description: Tri Counties Bank, located in Chico, California, recently partnered with the Federal Home Loan Bank of San Francisco to provide $180,000 in grants as part of the Empowering Homeownership Program.

data.title: Dr. Beth Ackerman appointed to Board of Education by Governor Youngkin, representing Rivermont Schools in Lynchburg, Virginia.
data.description: In Lynchburg, Virginia on July 17, 2025, it was announced that Dr. Beth Ackerman, Senior Vice President of Rivermont Schools, has been appointed to Governor Youngkin's Board of Education. This signifies Virginia's dedication to catering to the requirements of special education students. This decision showcases the state's focus on addressing the needs of special education students with precision. Dr. Ackerman's expertise will play a crucial role in shaping the educational landscape for these individuals. This appointment reflects a significant step towards enhancing the educational experience for special education students in Virginia.

data.title: Photographer Henry Diltz launches New England tour with rare rock images in Boston and New Hampshire on Aug 14.
data.description: Photographer Henry Diltz, renowned for his rock imagery in the '60s and '70s, will showcase his iconic work in New England on August 14th and August XX. The tour will include stops in Boston and New Hampshire, offering a rare opportunity for fans to view his celebrated photographs firsthand. Diltz's impactful images have left a lasting impression on the music world, and this exclusive tour presents a unique chance to experience his legendary work in person. Be sure not to miss this limited engagement in the Northeast, set to captivate audiences with a glimpse into the rich history of rock music.

data.title: Rezolve Ai confirms $1B Bitcoin treasury strategy for AI commerce platform integration and governance.
data.description: Efforts are currently being made to integrate Bitcoin-backed capital into Rezolve's AI commerce platform through strong financial structure and governance. This strategic and disciplined execution aims to enhance the platform's capabilities by incorporating Bitcoin-backed assets. The initiative involves the careful management of resources and adherence to sound financial practices. This move is part of an ongoing process to leverage Bitcoin's potential within the platform.

data.title: Study finds TGFB2 linked to survival in younger pancreatic cancer patients. Oncotelic Therapeutics to evaluate OT-101 as treatment in PDAC.
data.description: New data suggests the need for further examination of the experimental antisense drug OT-101 (trabedersen) targeting TGFB2 in treating pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC).
Merz States "I Was Not Surprised On EU Budget, It Was A Process"

data.title: Alan G. Hassenfeld, former CEO of Hasbro, passed away at 76. He became CEO in 1989 and transformed the company.
data.description: Alan G. Hassenfeld, the former Chairman and CEO of Hasbro, Inc., and renowned philanthropist, peacefully passed away in his sleep on July 9, 2025, in London at the age of 76. He was born on November 16, 1948, into the founding family of Hasbro and took over as CEO in 1989 after his brother, Stephen, passed away. Initially hesitant to take on the leadership role, Hassenfeld successfully turned the company into a dominant force in the industry. During his tenure, Hasbro acquired Tonka Parker Kenner, expanding its reach and influence.
